products.name: VME
features: VME: Wins in the long run
Launched in 1981, today most open architecture rugged systems in the world are based on the VME architecture.

products.name: VPX 3U
features: 2006 Launch of SBC340, the industry's first 3U VPX single board computer
모든 시스템 아키텍처, 폼 팩터 및 인터페이스 요구 사항에 맞는 모든 모양과 크기의 솔루션입니다.

products.name: VPX 6U
features: Key members of the Abaco HPEC solution include the SWE540 Fully Managed 6U VPX 40/10GigE Data Plane Ethernet Switch (NETernity SWE540), Layer 2/3 managed switching and routing.

products.name: CompactPCI
features: 30년이 지난 지금에도 CompactPCI는 검증된 견고한 폼 팩터에서 Intel Core i7 및 NXP QorIQ 프로세서 기술을 활용할 수 있도록 해줍니다.

products.name: PMC
features: Abaco Systems는 군사, 상업 및 통신 시장에 대한 전문 지식을 보유하고 있습니다.
애플리케이션 요구 사항 및 통신 프로토콜에 대한 심층적인 이해

products.name: XMC
features: Abaco의 고성능 XMC 제품군은 고급 애플리케이션의 까다로운 네트워킹, I/O 및 처리 요구 사항을 지원합니다.

products.name: FMC/FMC+
features: 아마도 FPGA 기술의 강력함과 유연성을 활용하기 위한 업계에서 가장 광범위한 메자닌일 것입니다.

products.name: HIMA HiMax System
features: HiMax는 고성능 요구 사항이 있는 안전이 중요한 철도 산업 애플리케이션을 위한 유연한 COTS 제어 시스템 제품군입니다.

products.name: HIMA HiMatrix System
features: HIMatrix는 중소 규모의 안전이 중요한 철도 애플리케이션을 위한 다양한 COTS 컨트롤러입니다.
사전 인증된 CENELEC SIL 4, 소형, 진동/충격 방지

products.name: 1U 5500/5600-Series Server
features: Intel 5500 시리즈 서버 보드, Intel Xeon 쿼드 코어 프로세서 2개, 550W AC/DC 또는 듀얼 750W 전원 공급 장치를 갖춘 1U NEBS 호환 서버

products.name: Expansion Optimized Server
features: 밀접하게 결합된 프로세서, 솔리드 스테이트 스토리지 및 가속기 공동 처리(GPGPU, Intel Xeon Phi, FPGA)를 통해 동종 시스템을 혁신하는 2U 서버

products.name: 3U 5000 Series Server
features: OSS는 랙마운트, 특수, 군용 견고성, 고밀도 및 HPC 변형을 위한 맞춤형 서버 구성을 제공합니다.
케이블 확장을 통한 PCIe에 최적화됨

products.name: FlashCUBE
features: CUBE 데스크탑 인클로저는 최대 13.25인치 길이의 이중 폭 1개 또는 단일 폭 전체 높이 I/O 카드 2개를 지원합니다.
PCIe 케이블 어댑터/케이블 또는 Thunderbolt 케이블 및 180W 전원 공급 장치 포함

products.name: Flash-µCUBE
features: uCUBE 데스크탑 인클로저는 최대 9.55인치 길이의 전체 높이 I/O 카드 1개를 지원합니다.
PCIe 케이블 어댑터/케이블 및 84W 외부 전원 공급 장치 포함

products.name: GPU CUBE
features: CUBE 데스크탑 인클로저는 PCIe 케이블 어댑터/케이블 또는 Thunderbolt 케이블 및 180W 전원 공급 장치를 사용하여 최대 13.25인치 길이의 이중 폭 1개 또는 단일 폭 전체 높이 I/O 카드 2개를 지원합니다.

products.name: Wind River VxWorks 6.9
features: VxWorks는 안전하고 지능적이며 연결된 장치를 위해 애플리케이션을 하드웨어 성능 및 신뢰성과 일치시키는 업계 최고의 상용 RTOS입니다.

products.name: Wind River Workbench 3.2
features: Wind River Workbench는 임베디드 장치 소프트웨어 개발을 위한 완전한 상용 개발 제품군입니다.

products.name: WIND RIVER LINUX
features: Wind River Linux는 상용 테스트를 거친 Yocto Project Linux 콘텐츠를 사용하여 Linux 기반 장치의 위험과 출시 기간을 줄이는 임베디드 Linux 솔루션입니다.

products.name: WIND RIVER PULSAR LINUX
features: Wind River Pulsar Linux는 배포된 장치를 보호하고 비용을 절감하기 위해 버그 수정 및 보안 취약성 수정을 제공하는 컨테이너 기반 OS입니다.

products.name: VxWorks 653 Platform
features: Wind River VxWorks 653 플랫폼은 ARINC Spec 653을 완벽하게 준수하는 안전하고 신뢰할 수 있는 RTOS로서 IMA 및 ARINC 규정 준수를 위한 강력한 파티셔닝을 제공합니다.

products.name: ISaGRAF
features: ISaGRAF는 마이크로컴퓨터 시스템과 PLC를 연결하도록 설계된 자동화 소프트웨어 기술의 참조이자 사실상의 표준입니다.

products.name: SE-Workbench-EO
features: SE-Workbench-EO는 EO 도메인의 센서를 사용하여 시스템을 자극하기 위해 최대한 현실적이어야 하는 복잡한 환경의 합성 모델을 생성하도록 설계되었습니다.

products.name: SE-Workbench-HWIL-EO
features: SE-FAST-HWIL은 폐쇄 루프 모드에서 매우 높은 프레임 속도(200Hz 이상)로 현실감 넘치는 적외선(IR) 이미지를 제공하도록 설계된 실시간 이미지 생성기 패키지입니다.

products.name: SE-Workbench-EOS
features: 전기 광학 분야의 타겟 서명 렌더링
EO 도메인의 항공기 서명 계산 전용 SE-WORKBENCH-EOS에 포함된 도구 및 데이터

products.name: SE-FAST-IG
features: SE-FAST-IG는 고성능 시각화 애플리케이션입니다.
CIGI 인터페이스를 통해 사용자 시뮬레이터로 구동되며 비행 훈련, 운전 시뮬레이션, 지상전 기능을 지원합니다.

products.name: SE-Workbench-RF
features: SE-Workbench-RF의 목적은 EM 소스 및 센서(일반적으로 레이더 시스템)를 사용하여 시스템을 시뮬레이션하기 위한 복잡한 환경의 합성 모델을 생성하는 것입니다.

products.name: SE-Workbench-SAR
features: SE-Workbench-SAR을 사용하면 고급 OKTAL-SE 소프트웨어로 SAR 데이터를 계산할 수 있습니다.
점근적 방법(GO, PO 및 ECM)과 결합된 광선 추적을 사용하여 계산된 SAR 원시 데이터

products.name: SE-Workbench-RBGM
features: SE-RAY-RADAR는 복잡한 3D 장면의 RBGM 컴퓨팅(Real Beam Ground Mapping) 전용입니다.
레이더 주파수, 스캐닝 매개변수, 궤적 임베딩, 시각화 모드를 시뮬레이션합니다.

products.name: SE-Workbench-AEO
features: SE-RAY-AEO: 펄스 LASER 상황, 정반사 우세 커버
범위 게이팅 용량 시뮬레이션 및 금속 또는 유전체 타겟의 감지/식별

products.name: SE-Workbench-GNSS
features: SE-NAV는 엄격한 환경에서 신호 수신을 평가하기 위한 전파 시뮬레이터입니다.
3D 가상 장면에서 GPS, GALILEO, BEIDOU 또는 의사위성의 성능을 예측합니다.

products.name: SE-AGETIM
features: SE-AGETIM은 시뮬레이션을 위한 3D 환경 생성을 가능하게 하는 통합 소프트웨어 도구 모음입니다.
GIS 전문가 전용, 완전한 통합 가능

products.name: SE-AGETIM-LIGHT
features: SE-AGETIM-LIGHT는 다양한 지리적 데이터 소스를 통합하여 센서 시뮬레이션을 위한 3D 환경을 쉽게 생성할 수 있는 간단한 독립형 소프트웨어입니다.

products.name: SE-AGETIM-BUILDING
features: SE-AGETIM-BUILDING은 건물 템플릿을 편집하고 SE-AGETIM의 템플릿에서 건물 돌출을 처리하는 데 전념합니다.

products.name: SE-AGETIM-INDOOR
features: SE-AGETIM-INDOOR is dedicated to the compilation of architectural plans including furniture, lighting and decorative objects through automatic extrusion of internal structures.

products.name: SE-TK FORM Suite
features: SE-Workbench special toolkit (TK) for expert users
Divided into two API families: Sophisticated Scenario Preparation and Dynamic Modification

products.name: SE-TK D SCNX Suite
features: SE-TK-D-SCNX enhances the SE-TOOLKIT functionality to make changes during scenario rendering in closed-loop mode.

products.name: Connext DDS Professional
features: RTI Connext DDS Professional is the first connectivity software for the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT).
Delivers low latency, high reliability, scalability, and security for mission-critical systems.

products.name: RTI Connext DDS Secure
features: RTI Connext DDS Secure enables IIoT designers to build secure and scalable systems of systems with granular security on Connext Databus.

products.name: RTI Connext DDS Micro
features: DDS Micro connectivity for distributed IIoT systems that meet stringent size, weight, and power (SWaP) requirements
small space connectivity framework

products.name: RTI Connext DDS Cert
features: RTI Connext DDS certification enables IIoT designers to build safety-critical systems.
Ready-made connection framework certified to the highest safety standards

products.name: SPx Server (Target Tracking)
features: The SPx server is a multi-function radar processor that provides radar deployment, plot extraction, and target tracking.

products.name: RadarView (Visualization)
features: RadarView is a Windows-based application from Cambridge Pixel for capturing and visualizing native radar video from a remote server, network interface, or HPx capture card.

products.name: SPx Radar Simulator
features: SPx Radar Simulator is a Windows-based application that generates simulated radar video data over a network socket along with terrain elevation data for realistic radar returns.

products.name: SPx Development
features: Cambridge Pixel's SPx development software for developers integrating radar processing or display functions

products.name: SPx Fusion Server
features: SPx Fusion fuses observations from multiple independent sensors into a single stream of correlated reports.

products.name: RDR Data Recorder
features: Cambridge Pixel's RDR provides full-featured, simultaneous multi-channel recording and playback of radar video, target tracking, AIS, ADS-B, IFF and navigation data.

products.name: VSD (Video Security Display)
features: VSD application interface to radar and cameras providing off-the-shelf situational awareness displays

products.name: ASD-100
features: The ASD-100 is Cambridge Pixel's PC-based airborne surveillance display for primary and secondary radar data.

products.name: SPx-Scan
features: SPx-Scan software-based radar scan translator for Windows and Linux/X11 that simplifies radar integration into graphics applications

products.name: SPx Radar Image Distribution
features: SPx Radar Image Server (RIS) is a scan conversion server that captures and scans radar video and converts it into images delivered to clients or web browsers.

products.name: SPx AIS
features: SPx AV is Cambridge Pixel's audio and video streaming software for compression, distribution and recording from a variety of sources.

products.name: HPx-346
features: The HPx-346 is a small form factor that combines an analog radar input with a network distribution card.

products.name: HPx-400e
features: The HPx-400e is a high-performance PCIe dual-stream radar acquisition card that captures analog and digital primary radar video from up to two radars.

products.name: HPx-300
features: The HPx-300 radar signal output card generates representative radar signals for testing, simulation, training, or streaming.

products.name: HPx-250
features: The HPx-250 is a high-performance PMC-based radar acquisition card that captures one to two analog and up to two bits of digital primary radar video.

products.name: HPx-200
features: The HPx-200 is a high-performance PCI-based radar acquisition card that captures one or two analog or up to 8-bit digital primary radar video.

products.name: WIND RIVER HELIX DEVICE CLOUD
features: Wind River Helix Device Cloud is an IoT device management platform that reduces the complexity of large-scale deployments through health monitoring and remote access.

products.name: TITANIUM CONTROL
features: Wind River Titanium Control: Increase agility and reduce operational/deployment costs with on-premises cloud infrastructure for critical services.

products.name: Wind River Simics
features: Simics simulates the smallest to most complex systems.
Moving from physical hardware to virtual labs allows embedded software teams to transform their development processes.

products.name: MXH532 PCIe 5.0 x16 Transparent Adapter
features: Performance and Specifications: Supports PCIe Gen5 (32GT/s) and fully backward compatible (1.0~5.0), ultra-low latency performance (100ns on chip / 600ns between apps)
Connectivity: Supports quad SFF-8614 x4 connectors and passive copper cables
Hardware design: Embedded Microchip Switchtec® Gen 5.0 PFX, low profile, half-length (LP-HL) form factor, status LED
Key features: RDMA (PIO/DMA) support, clock isolation and CFC/SSC automatic support, built-in EEPROM for multiple configurations
Software: eXpressWare™ software license included

products.name: MXH930 PCIe NTB Adapter
features: Performance and interface: PCIe Gen4 (16GT/s) support and backward compatibility (Gen1~4), equipped with Microchip PM40036-PFX chipset, ultra-low latency of less than 100ns (cut-through performance)
Connections and Cables: Uses quad SFF-8644 connectors. Supports copper and fiber optic cables. Compatible with CMI and non-CMI cables
Flexible port configuration: Provides multiple port configuration options including 1 (x16), 2 (x8), and 4 (x4)
Clustering and scalability: Supports 2-5 node cluster configuration, expandable up to 64-128 nodes when combined with MXS924
Key features: RDMA (PIO and DMA*) support, full host clock isolation and CFC/SSC automatic support, built-in EEPROM for custom settings (*DMA is in development)
Hardware design: low profile (LP) form factor, front link status LED

products.name: MXH932 PCIe Transparent Adapter
features: Interface and performance: PCIe Gen4 (16GT/s) support and backward compatibility (Gen1~4), ultra-low latency (cut-through) performance of less than 100ns, equipped with Microchip PM40036-PFX chipset
Connections and Cables: Based on quad SFF-8644 connectors, supports copper and fiber optic cables, PCIe 4.0 cable compatible with CMI support
Flexible port configuration (MXH932): 1x16, 2x8, and 4x4 ports can be configured according to user needs.
System scalability: Combined with MXS924, supports construction and expansion of large-scale I/O expansion system
Hardware and Reliability: Low-profile form factor, clock isolation and CFC/SSC auto support, front status LED and built-in EEPROM for customization

products.name: PXH830 PCIe NTB Adapter
features: Interface and performance: Supports PCIe Gen3 (8.0 Gbps/lane) and backward compatible (Gen1~3), supports RDMA (PIO and DMA)
Flexible port configuration: Equipped with 4 x4 Gen3 cable ports, flexibly configured as 1x16 or 2x8 ports according to user needs
Connectivity: Based on SFF-8644 (iPass+ HD / MiniSAS-HD®) connector, supports both copper and fiber optic cables
Bridging and Technology: Supports up to two non-transparent bridging (NTB) ports, full host clock isolation, and simultaneous CFC/SSC support.
Hardware design: low profile (LP) form factor, front link status LED, built-in EEPROM for customization

products.name: MXS924 PCIe 4.0 Switch
features: Performance and specifications: Equipped with high-performance Microchip PFX Gen4 chipset, supports PCIe 4.0 (16GT/s) and backward compatibility (Gen 1~4)
Ports and Connectivity: Provides a total of 24 PCIe 4.0 x4 ports (SFF-8644 connectors), supports copper and optical cables, supports hot plug for easy maintenance
System management: Ethernet-based remote management and monitoring function, intuitive port confirmation through status LED on the front panel
Hardware design: Standard 19-inch 1U rack-mount chassis, flexible expandability through multiple switch configurations

products.name: MCX453A-FCAT
features: ConnectX-4 1-port 56(40)Gb/s Infiniband (Ethernet) card
RoCE (RDMA over Integrated Ethernet) support
Supports SR-IOV/IEEE 802/IEEE 1588 v2
PCIe Gen 3.0 compatible, 1.1 and 2.0 compatible
Auto-negotiate to x8, x4, x2, or x1

products.name: MCX456A-FCAT
features: ConnectX-4 2-port 56(40)Gb/s Infiniband (Ethernet) card
RoCE (RDMA over Integrated Ethernet) support
Supports SR-IOV/IEEE 802/IEEE 1588 v2
PCIe Gen 3.0 compatible, 1.1 and 2.0 compatible
Auto-negotiate to x8, x4, x2, or x1

products.name: MCX555A-ECAT
features: ConnectX-5 1-port up to 100Gb/s Infiniband (Ethernet) card
RoCE (RDMA over Integrated Ethernet) support
Supports SR-IOV/IEEE 802/IEEE 1588 v2
PCIe Gen 4.0/3.0 compatible, 1.1 and 2.0 compatible
Auto-negotiate to x16, x8, x4, x2, or x1

products.name: MCX556A-ECAT
features: ConnectX-5 2-port up to 100Gb/s Infiniband (Ethernet) card
RoCE (RDMA over Integrated Ethernet) support
Supports SR-IOV/IEEE 802/IEEE 1588 v2
PCIe Gen 4.0/3.0 compatible, 1.1 and 2.0 compatible

products.name: ACE2004PT-POE (1G POE)
features: PCIe x4 quad-port 802.3at PoE+ Gigabit Vision frame grabber card (Intel I350)
Single port PoE output power consumption is up to 30W, and an external large 4-pin power supply interface is provided.
Adapt to the power consumption output required by external devices: Class 0, Class 1, Class 2, Class 3

products.name: ACE9804BT (10G)
features: Quad-port 10G SFP+ connectivity
PCI Express (PCIe) v3.0 (8.0GT/s) x8 lanes
network virtualization
PXE boot
IEEE 802.1q VLAN support through VLAN tagging
Half-height and full-height brackets

products.name: ACE9812BT (10G)
features: Dual port 10GbE adapter
PCI Express (PCIe) v3.0, 8.0GT/s, x4 lanes
Standard CAT 6a cabling using RJ45 connectors
Unified networking providing LAN iSCSI and FCoE in one affordable CNA
Network virtualization, low latency
Low profile and full height brackets

products.name: ACE1023PF-4SF28 (25G)
features: Intel chip-based fiber 25G Ethernet network adapter
Four 1/10/25GbE SFP28 ports provide multiple high-speed connections.
Dynamic Device Personalization (DDP)
Supports both RDMA iWARP and RoCEv2
Application Device Queue (ADQ)
IEEE 1588 Precision Time Protocol (PTP)
